td.title: TD Learning
td.oneLiner: Foundational algorithm for learning value estimates from experience without a model

pg.title: Policy Gradient
pg.oneLiner: REINFORCE: first gradient-based method for directly optimizing stochastic policies

ac.title: Actor-Critic
ac.oneLiner: Two-network architecture separating policy (actor) from value estimation (critic)

dqn.title: DQN
dqn.oneLiner: First deep RL to learn from raw pixels; replay buffer + target network stabilize training

ddpg.title: DDPG
ddpg.oneLiner: DQN extended to continuous actions via deterministic policy gradients and soft target updates

ppo.title: PPO
ppo.oneLiner: Clipped surrogate objective for stable on-policy learning; workhorse behind RLHF

sac.title: SAC
sac.oneLiner: Maximum-entropy off-policy actor-critic with automatic temperature tuning

bcq.title: BCQ
bcq.oneLiner: First continuous offline RL; constrains actions to the batch distribution via a VAE

bear.title: BEAR
bear.oneLiner: Offline RL via MMD-based support matching — weaker constraint than BCQ's distribution matching

cql.title: CQL
cql.oneLiner: Learns conservative Q-values that lower-bound true values, preventing OOD overestimation

rlhf.title: RLHF
rlhf.oneLiner: Aligns LLMs with human preferences via reward modeling + PPO fine-tuning

rlpd.title: RLPD
rlpd.oneLiner: SAC + symmetric sampling + LayerNorm + large ensemble = 2.5× prior offline-to-online SOTA

layernorm.title: LayerNorm
layernorm.oneLiner: Per-sample normalization that projects activations onto a hypersphere; critical for high-UTD RL

vae.title: VAE
vae.oneLiner: Variational Autoencoder: learned latent-variable generative model with reparameterization trick

cmaes.title: CMA-ES
cmaes.oneLiner: Derivative-free evolutionary optimization via covariance matrix adaptation

wm.title: World Models
wm.oneLiner: VAE + MDN-RNN world model; trains a tiny controller (867 params) entirely inside dreams

planet.title: PlaNet
planet.oneLiner: Introduced the RSSM and CEM planning in latent space; 200× more data-efficient than model-free

dreamer.title: Dreamer
dreamer.oneLiner: Actor-critic trained by backpropagating through learned latent dynamics (imagination)

dreamerv2.title: DreamerV2
dreamerv2.oneLiner: Discrete categorical latents + KL balancing; first world model to reach human-level Atari

dreamerv3.title: DreamerV3
dreamerv3.oneLiner: Fixed hyperparameters across 150+ tasks in 8 domains; first to collect diamonds in Minecraft

jepa.title: I-JEPA
jepa.oneLiner: Predicts image feature representations (not pixels) of masked regions via joint-embedding

vjepa.title: V-JEPA
vjepa.oneLiner: Self-supervised video model predicting features of masked spatiotemporal regions (~90% masking)

vjepa2.title: V-JEPA 2
vjepa2.oneLiner: 1B-param video understanding + action-conditioned world model for zero-shot robot planning

rc.title: Robot Ctrl
rc.oneLiner: Impedance, stiffness, and compliance control for contact-rich manipulation

fast.title: FAST
fast.oneLiner: DCT + BPE action tokenization reducing token count 3–13× for autoregressive VLAs

trpo.title: TRPO
trpo.oneLiner: Trust-region policy optimization with guaranteed monotonic improvement via KL constraints

gae.title: GAE
gae.oneLiner: Generalized Advantage Estimation: tunable bias-variance tradeoff for policy gradients

a3c.title: A3C / A2C
a3c.oneLiner: Asynchronous parallel actor-critic; showed parallelism can replace replay buffers

td3.title: TD3
td3.oneLiner: Twin critics + delayed policy updates + target smoothing fix DDPG's overestimation

redq.title: REDQ / DroQ
redq.authors: Chen et al. / Hiraoka et al.
redq.oneLiner: Large critic ensembles + high UTD ratios for sample-efficient continuous control

iql.title: IQL
iql.oneLiner: Implicit Q-Learning: avoids OOD actions entirely via expectile regression on the value function

awac.title: AWAC
awac.oneLiner: Advantage-weighted actor-critic for offline-to-online RL with implicit policy constraints

calql.title: Cal-QL
calql.oneLiner: Calibrated CQL that fixes over-conservatism by calibrating the lower bound to behavior value

serl.title: SERL
serl.oneLiner: Sample-Efficient Robot Learning: RLPD as core algorithm for real-world robotics

bro.title: BRO / CrossQ
bro.authors: Tarasov et al. / Bhatt et al.
bro.oneLiner: Builds on LayerNorm + high UTD insight for state-of-the-art continuous control

td7.title: TD7
td7.oneLiner: SOTA continuous control with LayerNorm, learned state embeddings, and checkpoint ensembles

grpo.title: GRPO
grpo.oneLiner: Group Relative Policy Optimization: replaces critic with group-level baselines for LLM RL

dpo.title: DPO
dpo.oneLiner: Direct Preference Optimization: reparameterizes RLHF as a classification loss, no reward model

tamer.title: TAMER
tamer.oneLiner: Training agents from real-time human feedback signals; early human-in-the-loop RL framework

christiano.title: DRLHP
christiano.oneLiner: Deep RL from Human Preferences: reward learning from pairwise comparisons; established the preference-based RM pipeline

instructgpt.title: InstructGPT
instructgpt.oneLiner: Scaled RLHF to GPT-3; demonstrated the SFT → RM → PPO pipeline for LLM alignment

cai.title: CAI (RLAIF)
cai.oneLiner: Constitutional AI: replaces human labelers with AI feedback guided by a constitution of principles

kto.title: KTO
kto.oneLiner: Kahneman-Tversky Optimization: binary good/bad signals instead of pairwise preferences

softql.title: Soft Q-Learning
softql.oneLiner: Maximum entropy Q-learning predecessor to SAC; energy-based policy via Stein variational gradient

dpg.title: DPG
dpg.oneLiner: Deterministic Policy Gradient theorem: theoretical foundation for DDPG

qlearning.title: Q-Learning
qlearning.oneLiner: Foundational off-policy TD algorithm that DQN scales with neural networks

doubleDqn.title: Double DQN
doubleDqn.oneLiner: Decouples action selection from evaluation to fix DQN's Q-value overestimation

rainbow.title: Rainbow
rainbow.oneLiner: Combines six DQN improvements (double, dueling, PER, multi-step, distributional, noisy)

d4pg.title: D4PG
d4pg.oneLiner: Distributional DDPG with prioritized replay and N-step returns

td3bc.title: TD3+BC
td3bc.oneLiner: Minimalist offline RL: just TD3 plus a behavioral cloning term

brac.title: BRAC
brac.oneLiner: Unifies offline RL methods under a common policy-regularization framework

dt.title: Dec. Transformer
dt.oneLiner: Decision Transformer: reframes offline RL as sequence modeling; conditions on desired return

sacn.title: SAC-N / EDAC
sacn.oneLiner: Large SAC ensembles + diversification for offline RL without explicit conservatism

drq.title: DrQ / DrQ-v2
drq.authors: Kostrikov et al. / Yarats et al.
drq.oneLiner: Data-regularized Q-learning: image augmentation makes SAC work from pixels

dyna.title: Dyna
dyna.oneLiner: Classic architecture of learning, planning, and acting with a learned model

daydreamer.title: DayDreamer
daydreamer.oneLiner: Applies Dreamer to real robots; learns locomotion in ~1 hour of interaction

tdmpc.title: TD-MPC / TD-MPC2
tdmpc.oneLiner: Combines learned latent dynamics with model-predictive control and TD-learning

byol.title: BYOL
byol.oneLiner: Bootstrap Your Own Latent: EMA target encoder + stop-gradient for self-supervised learning

mae.title: MAE
mae.oneLiner: Masked Autoencoders: self-supervised vision via high-ratio patch masking + pixel reconstruction

vit.title: ViT
vit.oneLiner: Vision Transformer: patch-based tokenization + standard Transformer for image classification

rope.title: RoPE
rope.oneLiner: Rotary Position Embedding: encodes position via rotation matrices for relative attention

ste.title: STE
ste.oneLiner: Straight-Through Estimator: enables gradient flow through discrete sampling via softmax backward pass

bpe.title: BPE
bpe.oneLiner: Byte Pair Encoding: iterative subword merging for open-vocabulary tokenization

pi0.title: π₀
pi0.oneLiner: Large-scale robot foundation model using FAST tokenization for manipulation

act.title: ACT
act.oneLiner: Action Chunking with Transformers: predicting chunks of future actions for robot learning
